commit.subject: LU-18624 build: Update ZFS version to 2.2.7
commit.message:
LU-18624 build: Update ZFS version to 2.2.7

Update ZFS version to 2.2.7. The changes are listed in:
https://github.com/openzfs/zfs/releases/tag/zfs-2.2.7

Test-Parameters: trivial fstype=zfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  env=SANITY_EXCEPT="66 413" \
  clientdistro=el8.10 serverdistro=el8.10 testlist=sanity

Test-Parameters: trivial fstype=zfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  env=SANITY_EXCEPT="66 413" \
  clientdistro=el9.4 serverdistro=el9.4 testlist=sanity

Test-Parameters: trivial fstype=zfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el9.4 serverdistro=el9.4 testgroup=full-dne-zfs-part-1

  env=SANITY_EXCEPT="66 413" \
